org.apache.dubbo.remoting.transport

类 AbstractClient

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.dubbo.remoting.transport.AbstractPeer
      • org.apache.dubbo.remoting.transport.AbstractEndpoint
        • org.apache.dubbo.remoting.transport.AbstractClient
  • 所有已实现的接口:
    Resetable, Channel, ChannelHandler, Client, Endpoint, IdleSensible
    直接已知子类:
    GrizzlyClient, MinaClient, NettyClient, NettyClient

    public abstract class AbstractClient
extends AbstractEndpoint
implements Client
    AbstractClient

      构造器和说明

      所有方法 实例方法 具体方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明

      close the channel.

      Graceful close the channel.

      get attribute.

      • 从类继承的方法 org.apache.dubbo.remoting.transport.AbstractEndpoint

        reset, reset

      • 从类继承的方法 org.apache.dubbo.remoting.transport.AbstractPeer

      • 从类继承的方法 java.lang.Object

        equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

      • 从接口继承的方法 org.apache.dubbo.remoting.Client

        reset

      • 从接口继承的方法 org.apache.dubbo.remoting.Endpoint
